title: Left Right Door Cable Wiring Harness Loom Plug fits Skoda Fabia Rapid Superb fits VW Golf Scirocco Tiguan Yeti Touareg Polo Passat
features: This high-quality aftermarket replacement is compatible with a wide range of vehicle models and years. It serves as an excellent alternative to OEM parts with numbers including 51277171, 1510010, 57306, 5730, 2321027, 1510450SC, V10830078, and various 1K-series numbers like 1K0937702C, 1K0959843C, 1K0971120BC, and many more in the 1K0971 series.

Suitable for: for Seat Alhambra, for Mii, and for Toledo IV from 2011 and later. for Skoda models like for Citigo (2012-2018), for Fabia (1999-2014), for Rapid, for Roomster, for Superb, and for Yeti from different years.

Fits VW models including for Amarok, for Caddy III Kombi, for EOS, for Golf Plus and for Golf V & VI & IV, for Passat 3C, for Passat CC, for Polo, for Scirocco, for Sharan, for Tiguan, for Touareg, for Touran, and for UP, covering years from 2004 to 2018.
